instruction: Explain what LoRA does in one sentence.
output: LoRA fine-tunes a model by training small adapter weights instead of changing every original parameter.

instruction: Give a short tip for avoiding GPU out-of-memory errors during fine-tuning.
output: Reduce batch size or sequence length and keep 4-bit loading enabled when possible.

instruction: Describe why checkpointing matters in remote GPU training.
output: Checkpointing lets you resume long runs after interruptions without losing all training progress.
